title: PaymentMethod
description: Saved payment tokens — NEVER card PAN/CVV/magnetic-stripe. Provider-scoped token IDs (Stripe pm_..., Paddle payment_method_id, etc.). Encrypted at rest. Deduplicated per customer via fingerprint hash. Carries `tenant_id` only. NEVER carries `application_id`, `region_id`, `organization_id`, `branch_id`, or `scope_node_id`.

customer_type.description: Polymorphic customer class name (User / Athlete). Enforced by observer to be tenant-scoped.

customer_id.description: Polymorphic customer ID. NULLED (not deleted) on UserErased — the row survives so historical Payment references still resolve, but the identifier is redacted.

provider.description: Enum: stripe / paddle / adyen / square / paypal / custom_webhook.

provider_reference_id.description: ENCRYPTED AT REST. Provider-native token: pm_... (Stripe), payment_method_id (Paddle), storedPaymentMethodId (Adyen), CARD_NONCE (Square), payment_method (PayPal), caller-defined (custom_webhook). NEVER the raw PAN.

method_type.description: Enum: card / bank_debit / bank_transfer / wallet / installment. Immutable after create.

brand.description: Enum: visa / mastercard / amex / discover / jcb / unionpay / sepa / ach / apple_pay / google_pay / paypal / venmo / cash_app / other. Nullable for non-card methods.

last4.description: Last 4 digits. NEVER the full PAN (PCI-DSS Level 1).

exp_month.description: Card expiry month, 1-12. Nullable for non-card methods.

exp_year.description: Card expiry year, 4-digit. Nullable for non-card methods.

fingerprint_hash.description: SHA-256 of the provider's card fingerprint. Prevents storing the same card multiple times per customer. NEVER the raw fingerprint.

billing_address.description: Billing address associated with the method at attach time. Shape: { line1, line2?, city, region, postal_code, country_code }. Nullable when the provider doesn't collect address details.

is_default.description: Customer's default payment method. Only one is_default=true per (customer, is_active) at a time — enforced by observer via lock-and-swap.

is_active.description: false when the method was deactivated (customer removed / card expired / provider failure / duplicate / fraud flag). Inactive methods retain for audit but never dispatch payments.

last_used_at.description: Last successful Payment against this method. Updated by PaymentObserver.created when payment_method_id matches.

verified_at.description: For methods requiring micro-deposit verification (ACH). Nullable for methods that don't require verification. Payments refused until verified.

deactivated_reason.description: Enum: customer_removed / card_expired / provider_failure / duplicate / fraud_flag. NULL when is_active=true.

indexes.name: payment_methods_customer_fingerprint_unique
indexes.description: Prevents storing the same card multiple times per customer. Duplicate detected → observer re-activates existing instead of creating new.

indexes.name: payment_methods_default_idx
indexes.predicate: is_default = true AND is_active = true AND deleted_at IS NULL

indexes.name: payment_methods_expiry_idx
indexes.predicate: is_active = true AND method_type = 'card' AND deleted_at IS NULL
indexes.description: For SyncPaymentMethodExpiryJob — weekly sweep flags cards expiring in 30 days.

x-invariants: unique (tenant_id, customer_type, customer_id, fingerprint_hash) WHERE deleted_at IS NULL — no duplicate cards per customer
at most one is_default = true per (customer, is_active) — enforced by observer lock-and-swap
provider_reference_id validates against per-provider format (Stripe pm_..., Paddle payment_method_id, Adyen storedPaymentMethodId, etc.) via valid_provider_reference_format rule
provider immutable after create — a Stripe token cannot become an Adyen token
last4 exactly 4 digits when set (never full PAN) — PCI-DSS Level 1
fingerprint_hash SHA-256 pattern enforced — raw fingerprint prohibited
verified_at required for ACH bank_debit methods before dispatch — PaymentIntentObserver refuses when verification missing
deactivated_reason NOT NULL when is_active = false
is_active cannot flip true→false without a deactivated_reason
soft-delete allowed; 90-day grace before hard-purge via PurgeExpiredPaymentDataJob
